name: Omnissiah — Proactive Intel Playbook (Manual + Mock Feed)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phase: $json.phase, technique_ids: $('Limit 1 Story').first().json.intel.mitre_techniques, query: `${$('Limit 1 Story').first().json.intel.threat_name} ${$json.phase} defense hardening detection ${$('Limit 1 Story').first().json.intel.mitre_techniques.join(' ')}`, top_k: 5, doc_types: ["defense", "mitre"] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, maxOutputTokens: 4096 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ case_id: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.intel_id, threat_name: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.threat_name, technique_ids: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.technique_ids, severity: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.severity, status: 'draft', markdown: $json.markdown, missing_techniques: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.missing_techniques }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ pipeline: 'proactive', threat_name: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.threat_name, technique_ids: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.technique_ids, playbook_id: $json.playbook_id, ref_id: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.intel_id, missing_techniques: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.missing_techniques, iocs: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.iocs, source: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.intel_source }) }}
